metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5555
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Cultured hippocampal neurons were immunostained for endogenous ADGRB2 (aka. BAI2), pre-synaptic marker protein synaptophysin (SYP) and postsynaptic marker PSD95 (DLG4). Confocal microscopy confirmed synaptic localization for ADGRB2 by partial co-localization with both marker proteins. The data does not support a more specific annotation to either pre- or post-synaptic compartments.

---

The experimental data annotated here will be included in an upcoming manuscript (by the SynGO consortium) that describes the SynGO 1.2 update, when a PMID is available this annotation will be updated with the respective reference.. Experimental description: Microscopy experiments were performed in cultured hippocampal mouse neurons.

antibody: Alomone, ABR-022, Rabbit, poly
